**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

The 'Apple Inc.' corporate hallucination has been decisively purged. Zhongshengda Rail Transit Co., Ltd. presents a staggering 'Large Enterprise' registry contradiction. Officially labeled as a 'Large' rail transit equipment manufacturer with a sophisticated 'Joint Stock Company' structure and 50 Million RMB in registered capital, its physical footprint mathematically collapses this narrative. The entity operates with absolutely 0 insured employees and relies on a personal '163.com' email. A heavy rail equipment manufacturer cannot function without an insured workforce. Deconstructing its business scope unveils the reality: alongside 'rail equipment', it heavily features 'manufacturing/sales of concrete structural components', 'construction waste recycling', and crucially, 'construction labor subcontracting'. This entity is conclusively an asset-light Project Bidding Shell or Engineering Contractor. It utilizes its high-capital, joint-stock facade to win municipal rail and subway infrastructure tenders (e.g., precast concrete sleepers or track slabs) and completely outsources the physical labor and heavy casting to subcontractors.
